reviews.title: COMFORT
reviews.text: I LOVE THIS SHOE DUE TO THE FACT I HAD HARDWARE INSTALLED INTO MY RIGHT FOOT BECAUSE MY TOES HAVE COLLAPSED FROM RHEUMATOID ARTHRITIS .... THE ORTHOPEADIC DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND ( RUNNING SHOE) SINCE I WORK ON CONCRETE FLOORS ..... THIS SHOE HELPS A GREAT DEAL FOR ME AND I HOPE IT HELPS SOMEONE ELSE GOING THROUGH THE SAME THING .... ALL THESE DIFFERENT KINDS OF GYM SHOES I BOUGHT AND NOTHING WORKS TIL THE DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND OF SHOE. I'M NOT GETTING PAID TO SAY THIS, BUT I WILL SAY, IF YOU WERE IN MY POSITION TRYING TO FIND COMFORT AFTER SPENDING $$$$ FOR SEVERAL DIFFERENT TYPES OF GYM SHOES AND SOMEONE RECOMMEND A CERTAIN BRAND COMPARED TO ALL THE $$$$ YOU SPENT PRIOR .... I WISH I COULD GET MY MONEY BACK ON EVERY F*****  SINGLE (18) PAIR OF SHOES I PURCHASED ... FROM NOW ON THIS IS MY ONLY GYM SHOE I'LL WEAR FOR NOW ON.... LOVE THE COMFORT, WIDTH, AND I'M ABLE TO WALK MORE THAN 1 MILE WITHOUT HAVING TO STOP BECAUSE MY FEET ARE HURTING DUE TO THE CHRONIC  (RA) CONDITION LIFE THROWN AT ME.  LOVE LOVE LOVE THESE SHOES

reviews.title: Had to get used to them
reviews.text: I love this brand of Nike. I have been wearing this Nike Zoom Vomero for years. It has changed over the years. This shoe at first seemed to tight. I had to loosen the laces. After warring them for about a month they fit fine. One thing that bothers me is they squeak when I walk.

reviews.title: Perfect in every way!
reviews.text: I went to the nike store to measure the curve of my foot and width prior to purchasing these shoes. I am relatively flatfooted and needed good arch support. These were the most fitting option and they were right! I absolutely love these shoes! Nike didn't have these in store at the time so I purchased online. Absolutely adore these shoes. Perfect color - goes along the black I usually wear on a daily basis to school. I generally wear them all day before and after gym. Love love love them!

title: ASICS Men's GT-2000 9 Running Shoes
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System - Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.

FlyteFoam Midsole Technology - Our FlyteFoam technology provides exceptional bounce back and responsiveness no matter the distance, utilizing organic super fibers to help reduce packing out that traditionally happens with softer, low density foams.
DuoMax Support System - A dual density midsole system positioned to enhance support and stability, positioned sport specifically.
Guidance Line Midsole Technology - Vertical flex groove decouples the tooling along the line of progression for enhanced gait efficiency.
Guidance Trusstic System Technology - This Trusstic System Technology integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

title: Brooks Women's Glycerin GTS 20 Supportive Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
manmade sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin GTS 20 is perfect for runners who think there is no such thing as too much cushioning and but require additional support from our trusted GuideRails which offer innovative technology to help guide your body in its natural path of motion while keeping excess movement in check. Predecessor: Brooks Glycerin GTS 19. This Brooks Glycerin GTS 20 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

GREAT SUPPORT: The Glycerin GTS 20 is the more supportive version of the Glycerin 20. With its integrated GuideRails holistic support system, excess movement is kept in check to keep you moving comfortably while providing additional support beyond just the feet, to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees.
MAXIMUM CUSHION AND SUPPORT: Provides maximum support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them!

SUPREME SOFTNESS: The ultimate in softness and supreme comfort, designed for runners who want pillowy soft cushioning. The Glycerin 20 with DNA LOFT v3 offers our softest cushioning optimized to be lightweight, responsive, and durable.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: New cushioning and redesigned outsole deliver smoother and more stable transitions for a supremely soft on-the-run experience that lets runners fully immerse in their miles.

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Excellent running shoes. The fit is more on the tight side, but it definitely fits. I give it 4/5 stars because it's not quite as comfortable as the Adidas Duramo line which also has adiprene. However I have yet to run a lot in these so it may be better than Duramo in the long term, or for more intense running. Duramo's have extra padding that, while very comfortable, feels like it could eventually start to chafe. These have a more snug fit with no such padding, but are still very comfortable.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 4 Running Shoes
description:
The gt-2000 4 is the core runner’s bread and butter with its balance of cushioning and stability, outfitted by the comfortably supportive dynamic duomax and guidance trusstic system that also enhance gait efficiency. Our rear foot and forefoot gel cushioning systems are now even more adaptive, assisting mild to moderate over pronators alike with greater support, while the fluid ride midsole offers the ultimate ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Impact Guidance System (I.G.S): ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic duomax Support System: This evolution of duomax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rear foot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Fluid ride: fluid ride provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Truss tic System: This Truss tic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Great shoe for an over-pronator like me
reviews.text: I've used the GT-2000 shoes over the last few years and have yet to have issue with them. I over-pronate pretty badly and this shoe offers great support for that issue; My knees thank me. I found the shoe to fit exactly true to size and for those reviews that say it's small, people tend to forget that your feet swell when you run, especially longer distances! My personal size foot is between a 6.5-7 and I typically wear a 7 shoe for running, dress, or sandals. I can't say I know the difference between the GT-2000 model numbers (1-5?) except for new-ness. I have no issue with wearing older models and like the cheaper prices. For reference, I run half marathons several times a year on city sidewalks, asphalt, dirt roads, and dirt trails.

reviews.title: Great shoe but runs small
reviews.text: Great shoe, very supportive in the arch and heel. I love the bright colors of the Asics shoes. The only thing I would be leary of is the size of the shoe. It runs small. I wear an 8 and because of other reviews, bought a 8-1/2. They fit but are still a little snug. After wearing for a bit, they will loosen up enough to be great. If you have a wider foot, you may not like these particular shoes.

reviews.title: Color in photo is not quite accurate
reviews.text: Have always loved my Asics GT-2000.  32 marathons and our relationship continues!  My only comment about this particular color combo is the photo appears to be grey and more coral color.  When they arrived what looks like a coral color in the photo is closer to fluorescent orange!  They are a bit "loud".  If they had been full price I probably would not have chosen them because of this.  Too "loud" for my preferences.  However, given the clearance price I'll make do!  :)

title: Brooks Men’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported

THIS MEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely light and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: My new favorite running shoe.

description: Reebok is an American-inspired global brand with a deep fitness heritage and a clear mission: To be the best fitness brand in the world. Not an easy one. But if there is one brand that can make it happen, it is Reebok, the brand that was fundamentally part of a fitness movement that forever changed the way we look at spandex and headbands. Sure, this is not the 1980s anymore – the world has moved on. But so has Reebok and it continues to be daring. Daring is knowing greatness doesn’t come from sameness. The past years have been characterized by a transformation from traditional sports to fitness. The three sides of the Reebok Delta, a symbol of change and transformation, represent the physical, mental and social changes that occur when individuals embrace the challenge of bettering themselves in the gym, in their lives and in the world.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 7 Running Shoes
description: Take on the toughest terrain in confidence with the men's GEL-VENTURE 7 performance trail running shoe by ASICS. Featuring GEL technology and an EVA midsole, this shoe is made for athletes who love to run in the great outdoors. GEL technology in the rearfoot area of the shoe provides shock absorption where you need it most, while the ORTHOLITE sockliner provides an additional layer of cushioning underfoot. It even molds to the shape of your feet, making each run even more comfortable than the last. Extra support comes from the sturdy upper crafted from synthetic leather, while the internal heel counter gently helps your foot remain in its natural line of motion, making for a more efficient stride. Meanwhile the EVA midsole protects your feet against impact and increases rebound, giving you an energetic feeling as you clock up the miles. Durable and practical, the GEL-VENTURE 7 shoe makes an excellent training partner whether you're new to trail running or a seasoned pro.

reviews.title: Great for disc golf
reviews.text: Image is my second attempt at patching a massive toe hole. Probably should just buy a new pair... These lasted through 4 months of pretty intense disc golf. All told, probably 350 miles of running on trails, through creeks and mud, etc. Not to mention repeated torsion on the fabric in a way it wasn't designed for. Through it all, these have dried quickly and remained comfortable. Not bad for $50, would buy again.

My existing pair has aged well, and after much wear, it has developed a tear in the inside lining near the heel.

reviews.title: Affordable and comfortable
reviews.text:
Update: I decided to keep these. Ok, so I am ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee, I tried them for everyday but couldn't get over what I'll call the "dad sneakers" look. But I took these for a run and wow! They're very comfortable. A little clunky but flexible enough for daily training and the cushion is just right for me, sightly on the plush side but not squishy. These are my new daily runners. I don't know how long they'll last, but for the price, if I get 200 miles, I'll be happy.

Also, if you're a 3e/4e and you like or need a wide toe box, these will deliver. I'm a smaller 4e but i need a wide toe box, especially since I'm not willing to give up my injinji toe socks. These are very spacious with plenty of room for my toe splay.

-----

Original review: From the product pictures I wasn't sure if I'd like them or hate them. But for the price I figured I might as well try them. They fit nicely, have moderate cushion, and they're more flexible than I expected. They're basic sneakers, no bells or whistles. But they're comfortable enough I would try running in them. They're certainly not fashion forward, but I wouldn't be ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee. And if you're looking for extra-wide these fit like a true 4e. I expected to hate them but I'm pleasantly surprised and I'll probably keep them and use they for everyday sneakers or runners.

features: ⛈️【High Quality & Weatherproof】Our runner shoe lights are made of aluminum alloy and ABS plastic, IPX5 Waterproof, these lights for shoes are built to withstand the toughest rainstorm. Rather it be snow or heavy rain, our gear got your cover.

These shoe lights for night safety are bright which can increase your visibility to avoid tripping on things and seeing the path. Let you see and be seen safely in the dark from dusk till dawn.

💡【Upgraded Hidden Switch】Press on the head of the shoe light to turn on/off and switch 3 different modes base on your need (Always Bright, Flashing, or Flashing slowly). It can retain power for 72 hours on its highest setting. An essential safety equipment for any low-light activity.

✨【Easy to Install】Night runner shoe lights the bottom design allows you to fix the shoe light on your shoelace or straps firmly. Note: Please remove the insulating paper between the two batteries at first.

🏃🏽【Application to All Outdoor Activities】Runners shoe lights for night safety, these lights for shoes are hands-free lighting solution for runners, hikers, or any outdoor enthusiast. You can safely trek through mountains, trails, or your own neighborhood knowing you’ve got reliable, safe lighting at all times. Whether running, cycling, walking, hiking, camping, fishing, or walking your dog.

So this is great for the walk to the coop every night.

reviews.title: Good quality
reviews.text: Great little product gives good light and I can pop them on my tennis shoes for camping.

reviews.title: Fun little headlights for your shoes
reviews.text: I've had these lights on my shoes full time for the last few days, and I really like them for evening walks.  They don't replace a flashlight, but they do light up a fair amount of the path that I wouldn't otherwise see with my small flashlight.  I've smacked them against car doors and chair rails a few times, and they've stayed solidly on my feet and are no worse for wear.  They are great for visibility for others too - your feet move a lot, and so do these lights.  Add flashing and you're much more visible either walking or on a bicycle.  I think they'd also be great for camping, and maybe at a dance party (flashing feet might be fun!)  My only thought is that they seem a little pricey, but they are one of the few that go on shoe laces and not just popping into holes in Crocs.  They're quite sturdy and battery life is great too.

reviews.title: Perfect for early morning/night walking
reviews.text: I bought these lights for an upcoming hike to the Grand Canyon in October. We need to start our hike before sunrise and thought these would be the perfect accessory to stop us from tripping in the dark. What I like - they are small and lightweight, with a secure clip for my shoes. The battery is a standard size. They are easy to turn off and on. I'm undecided on if these are really bright enough to be practical... is there a light - yes. Is it going to replace a flashlight - absolutely not. I don't know if I'd buy these again for the purpose of a hike, but they would be good if you are an early morning/late evening walker and runner and want additional lights for safety so cars, etc, can see you.

reviews.title: They are ok
reviews.text:
Batteries are not working. I have to replace them right from the start. I hope they will work.

They seem a bit heavy but I will use them. Safety is more important.

title: Brooks Women’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely lightweight and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

PERFORMANCE SNEAKERS FOR GIRLS - A sturdy, dependable everyday sneaker that provides ultimate durability for active kids. The lightweight, breathable mesh overlays create comfort and ventilation.

COMFORTABLE & DURABLE GIRLS ATHLETIC SHOES - The Avia compression molded EVA midsole and removable EVA sock add supportive cushioning for all-day wear.
COOL TODDLER & GIRLS SNEAKERS - In trendy, versatile colors, these running shoes go with everything in their wardrobes - and they stand out in the crowd!
NON-MARKING TPR SOLEPLATE - Kids will leave their mark on people, not on the ground or gym floor! The thick but light weight rubber sole holds up to everyday wear and play.
